examples: The maze is actually two interlocking spirals.
There are, in fact, a number of interlocking reasons for the popularity of English as a lingua franca.
India's futuristic new Bharathi base, built on stilts using 134 interlocking shipping containers, resembles a spaceship.
The Clinton White House believes an interlocking structure of arms control agreements can guarantee national security.
Despite interlocking financings and other relationships, the two businesses run more or less autonomously.
